scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run functions:check
scripts.functions:check: npx -y wrangler@4.104.0 pages functions build functions --outdir /tmp/project-apex-functions --compatibility-date 2026-06-24
scripts.cf:dev: npm run build && npx -y wrangler@4.104.0 pages dev dist
scripts.cf:create: npx -y wrangler@4.104.0 pages project create project-apex --production-branch main
scripts.cf:download-config: npx -y wrangler@4.104.0 pages download config project-apex
scripts.cf:upload: npm run build && npx -y wrangler@4.104.0 pages deploy dist --project-name project-apex --branch main
